auditTrail.notice: The Audit Trail provides a detailed record of system activities and user actions, ensuring transparency, accountability, and compliance. It includes information such as who performed an action, what action was performed, and when it occurred. This data can be exported as a JSON file, allowing for easy review, analysis, or integration with other systems.

msal.label: Microsoft Azure
msal.description: Microsoft Authentication Library (MSAL) is a library that helps you to obtain tokens from Azure AD and AAD B2C.

oidc.label: OpenID
oidc.description: OpenID Connect (OIDC) is an authentication layer on top of OAuth 2.0, an authorization framework.

clientId.label: Client ID
clientId.helpElement: The client ID is a public identifier for apps. It is used to build login URLs and identify the application.

clientSecret.label: Client Secret
clientSecret.helpElement: The client secret is a secret known only to the application and the authorization server.

endpoint.label: Issuer
endpoint.helpElement: The URL of the OpenID Connect provider.

callback.label: Callback URL
callback.helpElement: Please provide the following information as callback to your IT administrator to configure on the identity provider

authority.label: Authority
authority.helpElement: The authority is the URL of the Azure AD tenant.

clientId.label: Client ID
clientId.helpElement: The client ID is a public identifier for apps. It is used to build login URLs and identify the application.

clientSecret.label: Client Secret
clientSecret.helpElement: The client secret is a secret known only to the application and the authorization server.

enforced.label: Enforced
enforced.helpElement: If enabled, users will be required to sign in using SSO and basic authentication will not be available anymore.

updateConfirm.title: Confirmation
updateConfirm.content: Do you really wish to change this slug? Upon confirmation you will be redirected to the Login screen of the new slug.
